title: friesodielsia oxyphylla
intro: Friesodielsia oxyphylla, also known as the "Umbrella Tree", is a plant species belonging to the family Menispermaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Friesodielsia oxyphylla include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to exhibit antioxidant and neuroprotective effects. Friesodielsia oxyphylla is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
